summary: REQ-2 (contact email text + mailto) appears implemented. REQ-1 is only partially evidenced: the story title spelling in the diff does not exactly match the requested title, and the diff is truncated so the full provided Bengali story body (with no omissions/edits) and continued presence/functionality of the Stories comments component cannot be fully verified from the supplied evidence.

missing_requirements.requirement: Use the exact Bengali story title “আশ্রয়হীন” in the Stories (গল্প) section.
missing_requirements.reason: The title shown in the diff uses a different Bengali character sequence: “আশ্রয়হীন” (with য়) instead of the requested “আশ্রয়হীন” (with য়), so it does not meet the 'exact title' acceptance criteria.

missing_requirements.requirement: Render the full provided Bengali story body text with no omissions/edits and preserve paragraph breaks; keep the existing Stories comments component present and functional.
missing_requirements.reason: The Stories content shown in the diff is truncated (ends with "... [truncated]"), so it is not possible to verify that the full provided story body text is included without omissions/edits, nor to confirm from the snippet that the Stories comments component remains present and functional.

hallucinated_features.description: Added/changed contact form validation UX (email regex validation and inline error messaging) beyond just updating the displayed contact email address.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest explicitly says not to change contact form submission behavior beyond updating the displayed email address. The diff shows added validation state and messages (e.g., emailError, validateEmail, "Please enter a valid email address"), which is additional behavior.

hallucinated_features.description: Translate widget integration and footer attribution/Heart icon additions in the main App component.
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested by REQ-1/REQ-2; the BuildRequest scope is limited to Stories content replacement and Contact email update.

hallucinated_features.description: SEO metadata described as 'complete SEO metadata' (OG tags/canonical/etc.).
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest non-goal says not to change SEO metadata unless explicitly required for the email update; the diff summary references SEO metadata changes/additions, which are out of scope based on the request.
